title: codiaeum peltatum
intro: Codiaeum peltatum, also known as the Croton plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to Madagascar and widely cultivated as an ornamental plant. The plant's leaves are known to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Codiaeum peltatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine and holistic health practices.
